flashcards.definition: Triangles with all corresponding sides and angles congruent.
Corresponding Parts of Congruent Triangles are Congruent.
Sides and angles in the same relative position in congruent figures.
△ABC ≅ △DEF means A↔D, B↔E, C↔F for both angles and sides.
If two angles of one triangle are congruent to two of another, the third angles are congruent.
